nasb.text: For this is the message which you have heard from the beginning, that we should love one another;

esv.text: For this is the message that you have heard from the beginning, that we should love one another.

cnv.text: 我們應當彼此相愛，因為這是你們從起初聽見的信息。

ccb.text: 我们应当彼此相爱，这是你们起初听见的信息。

csbs.text: 因为你们从起初所听见的信息是这样的：我们要彼此相爱。
